data.name: Spirit Harem
data.detailed_description:
Spirit Harem is a relaxing and erotic visual novel! Immerse yourself in a light and fluffy story about restoring the world by building your relationship with spirit girls. You suddenly wake up in a new world where the spirits of all living things reside and they're cute girls for some reason?!?

Meet Rose, Daisy and Violet three flower spirits, eager to please their new master! Try to keep up with energetic and spunky Daisy or go play with the kind and caring Rose. Can you get shy Violet to open up to you? Interact with them and make dialogue choices to try and win their affection and unlock sexy scenes in this character driven visual novel. The game features high quality art with many vanilla erotic scenarios and sex scenes. Save the spirit world!

Can you get shy Violet to open up to you? Interact with them and make dialogue choices to try and win their affection and unlock sexy scenes in this character driven visual novel. The game features high quality art with many vanilla erotic scenarios and sex scenes. Save the spirit world!
data.short_description: An erotic visual novel about sexy spirit girls!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 印尼語, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 16+ / Debian 10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
